rationale.R1.1: Identifies the central tension in contributions and proposes a reframing that resolves it, showing a deep understanding of conceptual issues.
rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear rationale for each part, improving structural flow effectively.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for several claims and suggests adding evidence or hedging, marking confidence appropriately for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output mostly within scope but with one drift in the conclusion regarding the generality of results.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text, ensuring downstream safety.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack annotation, reducing traceability for some changes.
